title: athanasia incisa
intro: Athanasia incisa, also known as Mountain Soroako, is a plant species native to Madagascar, classified under the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. Athanasia incisa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine and may also be sold as dietary supplements.
